落魄草圣书法传承后人，三流大学文学专业毕业，只够温饱，难谈以后，浑浑噩噩！
    黄彧偶得灵蕴瞳，能看到古玩散发出来的灵蕴，后和几位志同道合的伙伴，一起在世界各地捡漏奇珍异宝，古玩字画等等！
      在国内各地捡漏，各种淘宝，如何做局破局，最终实现以收养藏的一代文物大佬！
     国外不管是流落海外的古玩古董，还是海外本土的古玩古董。竭尽全力的捡漏之旅，回流中华！

:1717663303,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7490963005697426201","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"昆仑之地隐隐约约感受到了龙腾虎跃的奇幻现象，原本就是仙家福地，这个时候变得更加的神秘，更加的灵气涌动。
而南海之滨，无数的群岛，隐隐约约浮现出一幅巨大的星辰图，横跨九州，直冲天际。
东海之畔更是汇聚了长江和黄河两条气运之龙，如龙归于海，气象万千。
整个华夏之地，仿佛整个空气都由原来的浑浊变得十分的清新自然。无数的名山大川开始灵气复苏，只要给他们时间，或许就能重新回到远古时代的仙家福地。
男主无敌一世。","text_exts":[{"e":167,"s":163,"text":"灵气复苏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%B5%E6%B0%94%E5%A4%8D%E8%8B%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177421067653811411%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227490963005697426201%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227196140474304826424%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%B5%E6%B0%94%E5%A4%8D%E8%8B%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1744133943,"group_id":"7196140474304826424","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"生命之可贵，基于分享与关怀。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N64MjqfV0MChLFq9QFc8UDU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cab0d11d882946919218a3523c45fe4f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776794893&x-signature=oKTG3eUzXMLJv%2FCCrlgSoUWdZ7g%3D","user_id":"470221866417108","user_name":"靓媳妇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"470221866417108","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7196140474304826424","book_info":{"abstract":"捡漏，鉴宝，低调，苟道，不打脸，不装逼。
